articles.brief: A structured 12-point audit framework for DACH CMOs assessing their team's AI marketing readiness. Each point should have: what to assess, what good looks like, what poor looks like, and a scoring guide (1-5). The 12 points: (1) content workflow mapping, (2) tool stack efficiency, (3) automation coverage of repetitive tasks, (4) measurement and attribution quality, (5) team AI literacy level, (6) prompt governance and documentation, (7) data quality for AI inputs, (8) competitive intelligence process, (9) channel performance benchmarking, (10) budget allocation vs. output ratio, (11) content quality and brand consistency, (12) speed from idea to published. Conclude with scoring interpretation: 12-24 (early stage), 25-40 (developing), 41-60 (advanced). Link to /insights/ai-marketing-stack-dach and /work.
